locations.name: Lumen Hair Studio - Central
locations.parking_info: Paid garage parking is available in the Market Street Garage across the street. Limited metered street parking and bike racks are located on Market Street.
locations.directions: We are located on Market Street between 10th and 11th. The nearest MUNI stop is Civic Center. Take the elevator to the 3rd floor and follow signs for Lumen Hair Studio.

locations.name: Lumen Hair Studio - Uptown
locations.parking_info: Street parking is available on Pine Avenue with a 2-hour limit. The closest public garage is the Uptown Parking Garage on Grant Avenue.
locations.directions: Located two blocks north of Union Square on Pine Avenue. From Powell Street BART, walk north on Powell and turn right on Pine.

products.name: Color Shield Sulfate-Free Shampoo
products.description: Gentle, sulfate-free daily shampoo formulated specifically for color-treated hair. Protects vibrancy while removing buildup without stripping moisture.

products.name: Volume Lift Daily Shampoo
products.description: Lightweight daily shampoo that adds lift and body without weighing hair down. Ideal for fine to medium hair types.

products.name: Hydration Repair Conditioner
products.description: Rich, repairing conditioner that restores softness and shine to dry, damaged hair. Safe for color-treated hair.

products.name: Curl Define Styling Cream
products.description: Moisturizing styling cream that defines curls, fights frizz, and adds touchable hold without crunch.

products.name: Scalp Balance Treatment Serum
products.description: Leave-on scalp serum that soothes irritation and balances oil production for a healthy scalp environment.

products.name: Blonde Guard Purple Shampoo
products.description: Pigmented purple shampoo that neutralizes brassiness in blonde and highlighted hair while protecting color.

products.name: Men’s Matte Finish Clay
products.description: Strong-hold matte clay ideal for textured men’s cuts. Adds definition and control with a natural finish.

products.name: Thermal Shield Heat Protectant Spray
products.description: Lightweight heat protectant spray that shields hair up to 450°F while smoothing and adding shine.

products.name: Radiance Leave-In Conditioning Mist
products.description: Weightless leave-in mist that detangles, adds shine, and provides light hydration for all hair types.

products.name: Deep Repair Hair Mask
products.description: Intensive weekly mask that deeply nourishes and repairs compromised hair, improving elasticity and shine.

products.name: Smooth Control Anti-Frizz Serum
products.description: Lightweight serum that tames frizz, seals split ends, and adds glass-like shine without greasiness.

products.name: Curl Care Sulfate-Free Shampoo
products.description: Low-foam, sulfate-free cleanser designed to gently refresh curls without disrupting natural pattern.

products.name: Lightweight Daily Conditioner
products.description: Everyday conditioner that provides light moisture and detangling for normal to fine hair.

products.name: Argan Nourish Hair Oil
products.description: Concentrated argan oil blend that smooths, softens, and adds shine to mid-lengths and ends.

products.name: Lumen Digital Gift Card
products.description: Email-delivered digital gift card redeemable for any service or product at Lumen Hair Studio locations.

products.name: Lumen Physical Gift Card
products.description: Classic plastic gift card mailed in a branded envelope. Redeemable in-salon for services and retail.

services.name: Women’s Short Cut with Wash & Style
services.description: Precision cut for short to chin-length hair including relaxing shampoo, scalp massage, and blow-dry style.

services.name: Women’s Classic Haircut with Wash & Style
services.description: Classic cut for medium to long hair with an expert consultation, shampoo, conditioning, and blow-dry style.

services.name: Women’s Express Dry Cut
services.description: Maintenance dry cut for existing styles. Does not include shampoo or full blowout style.

services.name: Women’s Luxe Cut, Wash & Signature Style
services.description: Luxe haircut experience with extended consultation, aromatherapy shampoo, conditioning treatment, and signature blowout finish.

services.name: Curly Cut & Shape
services.description: Specialized dry and wet cutting technique tailored for naturally curly and coily textures, includes cleanse, hydration, and diffuse style.

services.name: Men’s Classic Haircut
services.description: Classic men’s cut with consultation, shampoo, and style using styling product of your choice.

services.name: Men’s Clipper Cut
services.description: Quick clipper-only cut for short styles and fades. Does not include shampoo.

services.name: Beard Trim & Line-Up
services.description: Neck shave, beard shaping, and line-up with hot towel finish. Ideal add-on to any men’s cut.

services.name: Men’s Scalp Detox Treatment
services.description: Purifying scalp exfoliation and massage to remove buildup and promote a healthy scalp. Can be added before any haircut.

services.name: Single Process Color
services.description: All-over permanent or demi-permanent color for root-to-tip coverage. Includes shampoo and blow-dry style.

services.name: Partial Foil Highlight
services.description: Face-framing and crown highlights for subtle brightness. Includes toner, shampoo, and style.

services.name: Full Balayage
services.description: Hand-painted balayage for a sun-kissed, dimensional look on medium to long hair. Includes toner, shampoo, and blow-dry style.

services.name: Gloss & Toner Refresh
services.description: Shine-enhancing gloss and toner service to refresh faded color or balance tone between full color appointments.

services.name: Intensive Deep Conditioning Treatment
services.description: Custom mask and heat-infused conditioning treatment to restore moisture, strength, and shine. Ideal before or after color.

services.name: Signature Blowout & Style
services.description: Luxurious shampoo, conditioning, and round-brush blowout with hot tool finish for smooth or curled styles.

services.name: Cut & Color Refresh Package
services.description: Bundle and save on a classic haircut plus single process color. Includes consultation, shampoo, and blow-dry style.

services.name: Balayage Makeover Package
services.description: Transformative package including full balayage, classic haircut, and intensive deep conditioning treatment for maximum shine and dimension.

stylists.name: Aria Mendez
stylists.bio: Aria is a curl-focused stylist and colorist known for shaping lived-in cuts that honor the natural pattern of curly and coily hair. She combines dry and wet cutting techniques with moisture-rich treatments and dimensional color like balayage to create low-maintenance styles that grow out beautifully.

stylists.name: Liam Cho
stylists.bio: Liam specializes in modern mens grooming, from clean fades and classic scissor cuts to beard design and scalp care. His chair-side approach is detail-oriented and relaxed, with an emphasis on practical styling tips clients can recreate at home.

stylists.name: Nina Rossi
stylists.bio: As Lumens senior color specialist, Nina is all about luminous, multi-dimensional color. She is particularly sought after for balayage, blonding, and grey coverage transformations, always prioritizing hair health with strategic treatments and glosses.

stylists.name: Jordan Kim
stylists.bio: Jordan is a versatile stylist who loves creating effortless, everyday hair. From soft layers and bouncy blowouts to subtle color refreshes, Jordan focuses on styles that fit seamlessly into each clients routine.

stylists.name: Sophia Nguyen
stylists.bio: Sophia is a texture-obsessed stylist who focuses on helping clients embrace their natural curls and waves. She loves educating guests on product routines and diffusing techniques for frizz-free definition.

stylists.name: Marco Santori
stylists.bio: Marco brings a classic barbering background to the salon floor, blending traditional techniques with modern shapes. His strong technical foundation makes him a favorite for precision cuts on all hair types.

stylists.name: Elena Garcia
stylists.bio: Elena specializes in healthy-hair rituals and polished finishes. Guests book her for smoothing blowouts, shine-boosting treatments, and styling lessons before big events.

stylists.name: Riley Thompson
stylists.bio: Riley is a rising talent on the Lumen team, focusing on foundational cutting and styling services. They love collaborating with clients to find shapes that feel fresh but easy to maintain.

gallery_styles.title: Sunlit Caramel Balayage on Long Layers
gallery_styles.description: Hand-painted caramel ribbons on a deep brunette base with long layered ends and a soft face frame, finished with a polished wave.

gallery_styles.title: Soft Ash Balayage with Money Piece
gallery_styles.description: Cool ash highlights with a brighter money piece around the face on long, straight hair for a modern, lived-in blonde.

gallery_styles.title: Rich Mocha Balayage on Long Curls
gallery_styles.description: Dimensional mocha and espresso balayage painted to enhance natural curls, paired with a curl-focused shaping cut.

gallery_styles.title: Golden Balayage with Beachy Ends
gallery_styles.description: Sun-kissed golden balayage focused through the mid-lengths and ends, styled with loose, beachy texture.

gallery_styles.title: Soft Brunette Balayage on Medium Length
gallery_styles.description: Subtle hand-painted brightness through the ends of a shoulder-length cut for a low-maintenance brunette look.

gallery_styles.title: Face-Frame Highlights on Long Hair
gallery_styles.description: Bright, blended highlights around the face and crown on long hair for subtle dimension without a full color overhaul.

gallery_styles.title: Glossy Espresso Single-Process Color
gallery_styles.description: Rich espresso brown single-process color with a high-shine gloss and minimal layers for a sleek, polished finish.

gallery_styles.title: Curly Shape Cut with Diffused Finish
gallery_styles.description: Rounded curly cut with lifted crown and softly tapered ends, styled with lightweight curl cream and diffused dry.

gallery_styles.title: Clean Skin Fade with Textured Top
gallery_styles.description: Skin fade with a textured crop on top, styled with matte clay for a piecey, modern finish.

gallery_styles.title: Classic Taper with Side Part
gallery_styles.description: Timeless taper cut with a clean neckline and soft side part for a polished, professional look.

gallery_styles.title: Sleek Polished Blowout
gallery_styles.description: Ultra-smooth blowout on long hair with a beveled end and mirror-like shine, perfect for events or photos.

gallery_styles.title: Healthy Shine Treatment & Trim
gallery_styles.description: Dusting trim paired with an intensive deep conditioning treatment for smoother, more reflective mid-lengths and ends.
